[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)

- Description: Edgar->dao_protocol PR3 ramp: flip newsletter + email-agent tracking to the Python service
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1066
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/211
  
  Details:
  Ramped PR3 of the Edgar -> dao_protocol migration: added nginx location blocks in seni_ror_new edgar.conf so /newsletter/* and /email_agent/* open/click tracking now proxy to the dao_protocol FastAPI service (:8010) instead of Rails. Captured the Rails baseline first, backed up edgar.conf, inserted the blocks (guarded inserter), nginx -t, reload. Verified live: all four endpoints return 302 with redirect targets identical to the Rails baseline, and the dao_protocol journal confirms the service served them. Mirrored the live config into the versioned sentiment_importer/config/nginx.conf (#1066, following the #1059 PR2 pattern). Two of six routes now ramped (PR2 + PR3); rollback = drop the two location blocks + reload. Remaining ramps: PR4/PR5/PR6.
